Location & work preferences

Required

Are you legally authorized to work in the United States? *

You are a US citizen, already have an employment visa (O1, H1B, etc.), or are specifically covered under a TN/H1-B1/E-3.

Do you require visa sponsorship to work legally in the United States (now or in the future)? *

This includes needing sponsorship for CPT, OPT or other visa types to work in the US.

Are you open to working remotely? *

Are you willing to relocate? *
